'''âj-sh-s''' ('''kajashas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unadd|unadd]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unadd|unadd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-sh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kajashas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijashas|thijashas]] || [[word:jijashas|jijashas]] || [[word:shijashas|shijashas]] || [[word:kijashas|kijashas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujashas|thuthujashas]] || [[word:jujujashas|jujujashas]] || [[word:shushujashas|shushujashas]] || [[word:kukujashas|kukujashas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujashas|thujashas]] || [[word:jujashas|jujashas]] || [[word:shujashas|shujashas]] || [[word:kujashas|kujashas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujashas|thujashas]] || [[word:jujashas|jujashas]] || [[word:shujashas|shujashas]] || [[word:kujashas|kujashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejashas|thejashas]] || [[word:jejashas|jejashas]] || [[word:shejashas|shejashas]] || [[word:kejashas|kejashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojashas|thothojashas]] || [[word:jojojashas|jojojashas]] || [[word:shoshojashas|shoshojashas]] || [[word:kokojashas|kokojashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojashas|thojashas]] || [[word:jojashas|jojashas]] || [[word:shojashas|shojashas]] || [[word:kojashas|kojashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojashas|thojashas]] || [[word:jojashas|jojashas]] || [[word:shojashas|shojashas]] || [[word:kojashas|kojashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjashas|thĂŠjashas]] || [[word:jĂŠjashas|jĂŠjashas]] || [[word:shĂŠjashas|shĂŠjashas]] || [[word:kĂŠjashas|kĂŠjashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajashas|thathajashas]] || [[word:jajajashas|jajajashas]] || [[word:shashajashas|shashajashas]] || [[word:kakajashas|kakajashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajashas|thajashas]] || [[word:jajashas|jajashas]] || [[word:shajashas|shajashas]] || [[word:kajashas|kajashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajashas|thajashas]] || [[word:jajashas|jajashas]] || [[word:shajashas|shajashas]] || [[word:kajashas|kajashas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajashas|shajashas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajashas|goshajashas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajashas|gokishajashas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajashasnĂŒ|shajashasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajashasnknĂŒ|goshajashasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashasnĂŒ|gokishajashasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajashashĂ«|shajashashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajashasnkshĂ«|goshajashasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajashashĂ«|gokishajashashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashasro|shajashasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashasnkro|goshajashasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashasro|gokishajashasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashasmu|shajashasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashasnkmu|goshajashasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashasmu|gokishajashasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajashasher|shajashasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajashasnksher|goshajashasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajashasher|gokishajashasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajashasng|shajashasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajashasnkng|goshajashasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajashasng|gokishajashasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajashasya|shajashasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajashasnkya|goshajashasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajashasya|gokishajashasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajashasyam|shajashasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajashasnkyam|goshajashasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajashasyam|gokishajashasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashasnĂŒshĂ«|shajashasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajashasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajashasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashasnĂŒro|shajashasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashasnknĂŒro|goshajashasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashasnĂŒro|gokishajashasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashasnĂŒmu|shajashasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashasnknĂŒmu|goshajashasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashasnĂŒmu|gokishajashasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashashĂ«nĂŒ|shajashashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajashasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajashashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashashĂ«ro|shajashashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashasnkshĂ«ro|goshajashasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashashĂ«ro|gokishajashashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashashĂ«mu|shajashashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashasnkshĂ«mu|goshajashasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashashĂ«mu|gokishajashashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashasronĂŒ|shajashasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashasnkronĂŒ|goshajashasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashasronĂŒ|gokishajashasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashasroshĂ«|shajashasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashasnkroshĂ«|goshajashasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashasroshĂ«|gokishajashasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashasromu|shajashasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashasnkromu|goshajashasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashasromu|gokishajashasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashasmunĂŒ|shajashasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashasnkmunĂŒ|goshajashasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashasmunĂŒ|gokishajashasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashasmushĂ«|shajashasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashasnkmushĂ«|goshajashasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashasmushĂ«|gokishajashasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashasmuro|shajashasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashasnkmuro|goshajashasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashasmuro|gokishajashasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
